title: Linux Password File Direct Modification
description: Detects direct writes to /etc/passwd or /etc/shadow files, bypassing normal user management tools. This could indicate account creation for persistence.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*>> /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*> /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*>> /etc/shadow*' or msg like '*> /etc/shadow*')) or ((msg like '*tee /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*tee -a /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*sed -i.*\/etc\/passwd*' or msg like '*sed -i.*\/etc\/shadow*')))
